meta.series: ETF 시리즈 ep07 보충편 (재투자 정밀 시뮬편)
titles: "JEPI 10년 뒤에도 돈이 거의 그대로?" 형제 ETF QYLD 12년 데이터로 다시 계산했더니 (ep07 보충편)
JEPI 배당 6년치 어디다 뒀냐가 통장 7,621달러를 갈랐다 — 박대리 A·B·C 정밀 시뮬
"배당 재투자하면 다른 거 아니냐?" JEPI 6년 다시 계산했더니, 격차가 오히려 더 벌어졌다 (ep07 보충편)
meta.title_confirmed: "JEPI 10년 뒤에도 돈이 거의 그대로?" 형제 ETF QYLD 12년 데이터로 다시 계산했더니 (ep07 보충편)

image_concepts.A: 똑똑이가 계산기와 JEPI 티커 옆에서 정정·재계산하는 신뢰 회복 톤 (인물 감정 + 구체 종목)
image_concepts.B: 박대리 A vs C 통장 잔고 좌우 대비 + 똑똑이가 76%p 격차를 짚어주는 충격 대비 톤

design_rules_applied: 메모리 룰 — 경제 교육 스컹크 공식: 상단 47% 스컹크+오브젝트, 하단 53% 순검정
메모리 룰 — A/B 승리 공식: 1번 슬롯=인물(스컹크)+구체 종목/사건+10자 이하 텍스트
메모리 룰 — 인물 중심 설계: 추상 오브젝트 단독 금지, 스컹크 표정·제스처 중심
메모리 룰 — prompt_en 환각 방지 부정형 문구 금지 (positive 묘사만)
thumbnail-strategy.json — bottom-53-black 그라데이션 강화 문구 prompt_en에 직접 포함
patterns.md §A-4 — 정정 영상 정체성 노출: 차분·집중·계산기 표정 (경계/의심 X)

thumbnails.concept_ko: 1번(A안 — 메인 추천): 똑똑이 스컹크가 정장+안경 차림으로 한 손에 계산기를 들고 다른 손 검지로 옆에 떠 있는 'JEPI' 종목 티커를 정확히 짚는 자세. 차분하고 권위 있는 정정 모드. 배경은 어두운 네이비에서 검정으로 그라데이션, JEPI 티커는 빨강 글로우, 골드 회계장부 라인이 배경에 살짝 흐름. 시청자에게 '이 채널은 본편에서 풀지 못한 부분을 보충편으로 한 단계 더 정밀하게 풀어준다'는 신뢰 강화 메시지 전달.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic illustration of a cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, wearing a navy blue blazer and round glasses with a calm, confident, professorial expression. The skunk holds a chunky calculator in one paw and uses the other paw's index finger to precisely point at a glowing red ticker symbol that clearly reads 'JEPI' floating in the air beside him. Subtle golden ledger grid lines flow across a deep navy background that gradients into pure black. Cinematic side lighting from upper left, sharp rim light separates the skunk from the dark backdrop, vivid saturated tones with bright vibrant highlights on the calculator and JEPI ticker. The composition places the skunk and ticker entirely in the upper portion of the frame, large and clearly recognizable even at thumbnail scale. Mood is trustworthy correction and quiet authority. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements, no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 2번(B안 — A/B 좌우 대비): 똑똑이 스컹크가 가운데 서서 양손으로 좌우 두 통장의 격차를 표현. 좌측은 박대리 A의 어둡게 시든 통장(달러 아이콘 작게), 우측은 박대리 C의 골드 라이트가 비치는 통장(달러 아이콘 크게). 가운데 위쪽에 '+76%p' 빨강 숫자가 떠 있음. 시각적 드라마 — 같은 출발선에서 6년 뒤 갈린 결과 한눈에.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic illustration of a cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, standing in the center of the frame with both paws raised in an exaggerated 'this much difference' gesture, mouth slightly open in shocked emphasis. To the left, a dark, dim, deflated bank passbook with a small dollar symbol drawn in faded gray. To the right, a brightly glowing bank passbook with a large golden dollar symbol radiating warm light. Above the skunk's head, a bold red number '+76%p' floats with a soft red glow. Background is a deep navy gradient transitioning into pure black, with subtle golden financial chart lines crossing diagonally upward on the right side and downward on the left. Vivid saturated colors, dramatic side lighting, sharp contrast between the two passbooks. The skunk and both passbooks are placed entirely in the upper portion of the frame, large and clearly readable at small thumbnail size. Mood is dramatic financial reveal with controlled authority. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements, no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 3번(와일드카드 — 반전 시각화): 똑똑이가 한 손에 'JEPI' 종목 티커 스티커를 들고 다른 손에 'SP500' 티커를 들어 천천히 비교하는 자세. 양 티커 사이로 누적 수익률 그래프가 솟아오르는데 SP500 라인이 JEPI 라인 위로 더 가파르게 벌어지는 모습. 표정은 살짝 놀란 듯 차분한 '오히려 더 벌어졌네' 톤. 배경은 네이비-검정 그라데이션 + 골드 그래프 라인.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic illustration of a cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, wearing a charcoal vest, holding two ticker symbol cards side by side at chest height. The left card clearly displays 'JEPI' in white block letters on a teal background, the right card clearly displays 'SP500' in white block letters on a vivid red background. Between and behind the two cards, two ascending performance line graphs rise from the bottom, the SP500 line in bright gold climbing visibly steeper and higher than the JEPI line in muted teal, with the gap between them widening dramatically toward the top. The skunk's expression is calm but mildly surprised, an 'actually the gap got wider' look. Deep navy background gradients into solid black, subtle golden ledger grid behind the graphs. Bright vibrant colors with high-key cinematic lighting on the skunk and ticker cards, dramatic rim light. The skunk, ticker cards, and rising graphs all sit entirely in the upper portion of the frame, large and clearly visible at thumbnail scale. Mood is data-driven revelation with friendly authority. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements, no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
